Name: -1_the_plug_remote_headset
Representative_Docs: ['i would not buy again unless i bought a gb model i generally really like samsung gear and android products i purchased this for one of my children and spend a lot of time deleting games in order for her to add new ones due to the gb of storage less usable due to the operating system it does allow for an external memory card however many games do not allow you to store the apps on the external card main problem is that the device memory is only gb that is a huge painpoint for this otherwise great device this is why i cannot give this above a', 'missing essential functionality not enough meat on the bone to justify the price missing some essential functionality its obvious people like me are going to attach this camera to moving vehicles of various sorts there is nowhere on the camera to attach a safety rope lanyard string none and what is worse none of the included mounts have the little nub that goes in the hole next to the standard camera mount this means when it vibrates there is nothing to stop the camera from turning and unscrewing from the mount the only mount that has the nub is the piece of plastic in the packaging that you throw away guess we can just hope it doesn t vibrate loose because you wont attach a lanyard to it i expected more for less i could have had a samsung gear and gb microsd for this should have included gb microsd and a nd battery there is no way to power the device while driving down the road because that requires opening the side door this also means no attaching an external mic while driving down the road because on a motorcycle the side door has to be open there just isn t enough meat on the bone to justify this price instructions are seriously lacking and or inaccurate i cannot believe i can t attach a safety cable to a camera that s just pure engineering blunder i figured the software would make a difference and get rid of some of the stitching weirdness you see in gear videos it does not this camera doesn t use eis stabilization in vr mode either it does not over heat that i can tell otherwise i think samsung gear makes more economic sense based on capability and price', 'best in it s class i bought this so that i can work on documents with a headset most headsets do not have the resolution to display fine grained text this one does i like that you can use it connected directly to a computer basically the device comes with an hdmi plug connected directly to the headset it also comes with an adaptor cable the splits the hdmi plug into an hdmi plug and usb power cord plug if you plug the hdmi plug and usb power cord plug into the hdmi receptacle and usb receptacle respectively on your laptop it works as an external monitor i like that it is very clean in this respect no need for an external battery pack or any other external module just the headset on your head and a cable going to your laptop i also own the sony hmz t w h which is the only other headset i have found with sufficient clarity to work on documents however the sony is only p this one is p the sony has a cumbersome external battery pack this one you just plug into the laptop and it gets power from there the sony doesn t have motion sensors this one does d on the sony is harder to configure this one you just press a button however the sony does do both top bottom d as well as side by side d whereas the goovis only does side by side it does come with what is essentially an android computer what they call the remote the remote is not needed when plugging directly into a laptop or other device unless you want to use it as a battery power supply for the headset when plugin into phones ipads and the like in this case you use the splitter cable plug the usb plug into the receptacle on the remote and plug the hdmi plug potentially using an adaptor into your device when plugging directly into the remote you can just plug the hdmi plug in it appears that the hdmi receptacle on the remote provides power to the headset thus no need to use the splitter cable the remote has netflix youtube amazon video firefox and some other apps on it one of the apps is a panoramic movie app i have viewed panoramic movies created using my samsung gear camera it works great incredible picture really and much simpler than trying to watch videos on gear vr windows mr etc the headset must have motion sensors because you are able to look around in the video you can get your videos onto the remote using a microsd card or usb flash drive i tried the youtube app on the remote with both d and videos if you can find a side by side d video you use the touchpad on the remote to switch to full screen view then use the d d button on the bottom of the headset and wallah very good d video that being said the device does seem to struggle with some videos lots of stuttering other videos are great then i loaded a video on youtube sure enough the motion sensors kicked in again and you can look around the video i have tried watching videos on both samsung gear vr and windows mixed reality and the goovis is by far the easiest to use by the way the remote can be used with other monitors and does not need to be used with the included headset i used it with a desktop monitor and the sony headset the bad well look how expensive it is in summary it s lightweight best picture quality i ve seen on a headset very easy to use whether you are hooking it up to a laptop or connecting it to the included android remote device i think it s a keeper']

Name: 0_the_it_to_and
Representative_Docs: ['impressive upgrade for a fitness user from gear s sport g reducing review to star watch began bootlooping last week and i wasn t able to revive it i opened the watch this morning to find it full of water ive only used the watch as directed and it doesn t seem to be up to the task i love the watch functionally but ultimately if it can t meet its own product description it is useless after researching the bootloop issue it seems that water ingress is a common concern amongst owners skip to the review heading if you don t care about the factors at play that influenced my purchase update just about months in of daily use by a very active user i probably use watch gps for hours a week on average and the watch has spent probably a hundred hours in the pool my battery is at with days and hours on the battery my opinion of the watch has only improved despite daily use in rough environments cramped car engine bays chlorinated pools etc the watch still looks brand new there isn t a scratch on the face and battery life is still as good or better than new i was concerned the lack of bezel would allow the face to be scratched more but this watch is tough i know i ve impacted it on tools concrete and other cringe inducing materials and it doesn t show any wear i ve taken to swimming in our yd pool in the backyard since everything else is closed and even with these super short laps the lap counter function is still dead on it helps keep me from going crazy counting out the laps that equal a mile i m not sure what else i can share this is definitely one of my all time favorite gadgets update starting to regularly see battery life of days last two recharges went onto the charger with battery left after approximately d h usage each given the fact that i use the watch for gps related items almost every day i m nervous to push it an extra day but based on the way the battery life continues to increase slowly i m sure i ll be there soon i cannot express enough how pleased i am with this watch update after about weeks with the watch i regularly get full days to a charge with standard use if i use the gps for more than a few hours over that time i might find myself needing to charge after days just to be safe after minutes with the gps on not tethered to phone this weekend i had used of my battery battery life is fantastic easily double the best battery life i saw with my gear s backstory i ve been using a samsung gear s sport for a little over years now it s served me well but even after a battery replacement i m struggling to get more than hours out of a charge and little more than minutes of gps time as an endurance athlete this won t cut it for me shopping when i first got the gear s the smartwatch was more of a fun toy not something i needed i ve enjoyed the conveniences its brought me so much that it is now a requirement and i found myself looking to replace it with an upgrade my minimum requirements for a smartwatch narrowed options quite a bit probably my favorite feature is being able to answer calls when connected via bluetooth to my phone through the watch itself as someone who is always keeping busy its great to be able to answer a phone call hands free while working under my car on a ladder or on a bike ride having a built in microphone and speaker was a must a battery with enough capacity for a hour run or bike ride was also an absolute must for fitness tracking water resistance was also important but i already take my gear s off when i swim so it wasn t a requirement i was willing to look at other brands ecosystems but i have thoroughly enjoyed my experience with samsung health so i looked to samsung watches first luckily they offered a watch that met pretty much all of my needs review as i write this review i m still on my first charge left after hours so you may consider this a little premature i m writing this review because of the incredibly positive experience i ve already had i purchased the mm aluminum version because the mm version was sold out and i wanted to take advantage of the cyber monday deal i had seen in reviews that people regretted getting the mm because it was too large and i do have smaller wrists coming from the mm gear s i wasn t too nervous but the idea of a smaller watch intrigued me as it would be less likely to get in the way size see pictures for how the mm watch looks on a tall guy with skinny wrists i think the pictures make it look a little larger than it actually is and feels it s about mm thinner than my gear s and despite supposedly being about mm larger in diameter when the two are compared side by side they appear to be the same size the band is definitely suited for people with larger wrists when i have it on the second smallest size its just a tiny bit loose and the smallest size is right about snug this band would likely not work for men of smaller stature or most women i would assume the mm version has a smaller band but i cannot confirm i am very pleased with the size and weight at right around g its half the weight of the stainless gear s i came from i was concerned about durability upon discovering its an aluminum watch but after wearing it the build quality feels excellent battery life the mm version has a battery that s approximately larger than the mm which was important to me in the interest of fitness tracking i normally remove my watch every night to charge but with my normal use it looks like i ll be able to get away with charging it every to nights i m at now after hours and that includes an hour of auto detected workout a run and a swim i do keep wi fi off i don t use the wake up gesture watch face turn on when lifting wrist and i keep default brightness low but auto fitness tracking part of what prompted me to write a positive review so quickly was my morning run swim today the improvements over my gear s are tremendous as you can now customize the data displayed for each individual workout type want to see heart rate speed and elapsed time ok want different metrics also ok totally customizable with big text that is easy to read this watch is supposedly waterproof to atmospheres and has a swim tracker so i had to try it out i swam lenghts in the pool this morning and without any setup or configuration the watch also counted i was astonished there is an option to set your pool lenght so it can accurately measure total distance also the data provided is also variable time per length strokes per length time per yd etc it isn t accurate but of the time the information appears to be spot on i m a casual swimmer who is always trying to get faster so i m really looking forward to using this on my intense workouts syncing samsung health with strava couldn t be easier and was completely seamless when switching from my gear s to the active other notes the gear s had a physical rotating bezel that sat proud of the watch face the galaxy watch active has no physical bezel just a touch bezel surrounding the display i was and still am nervous to lose the protection provided by the physical bezel and i also enjoyed being able to go right to the bezel to wake and control the watch thankfully the touch bezel is just as intuitive as the physical one with excellent haptic and visual feedback resulting in a level of control that feels completely natural even after years of muscle memory built up from a physical bezel i wear my watch and totally use it as a fashion device when attending formal gatherings i ll generally turn the watch face to always on and chose a neat face when i m dressed up the galaxy wear app will now allow you to take a picture of your attire and provide you with a selection of faces that match your theme this is really cool and it works exactly as you would expect it to the beautiful design of the watch only makes me want to show it off more they ve really improved the design from the earlier generations and it feels and looks less like a tech gadget and more like a traditional watch really my only gripe for this and all samsung watches is the lack of rd party support it is much better now than when i first got my gear but the galaxy app store really feels like it is about years old since apps aren t too big of a deal for me i don t mind much but it did take getting used to and eventually just ignoring the app store and its limited options i did find strava mapmyrun smartthings alexa and other apps but i haven t really found a need for them update after about weeks with the watch i regularly get full days to a charge with standard use if i use the gps for more than a few hours over that time i might find myself needing to charge after days just to be safe after minutes with the gps on not tethered to phone this weekend i had used of my battery battery life is fantastic easily double the best battery life i saw with my gear s update starting to regularly see battery life of days last two recharges went onto the charger with battery left after approximately d h usage each given the fact that i use the watch for gps related items almost every day i m nervous to push it an extra day but based on the way the battery life continues to increase slowly i m sure i ll be there soon i cannot express enough how pleased i am with this watch update just about months in of daily use by a very active user i probably use watch gps for hours a week on average and the watch has spent probably a hundred hours in the pool my battery is at with days and hours on the battery my opinion of the watch has only improved despite daily use in rough environments cramped car engine bays chlorinated pools etc the watch still looks brand new there isn t a scratch on the face and battery life is still as good or better than new i was concerned the lack of bezel would allow the face to be scratched more but this watch is tough i know i ve impacted it on tools concrete and other cringe inducing materials and it doesn t show any wear i ve taken to swimming in our yd pool in the backyard since everything else is closed and even with these super short laps the lap counter function is still dead on it helps keep me from going crazy counting out the laps that equal a mile i m not sure what else i can share this is definitely one of my all time favorite gadgets', 'samsung is almost there but one major flaw no notification history per app update lowering rating from to stars receiving notifications is a big part for me the problem is even though i m using a samsung s that the watch only shows you the most recent notification per app for example let s say your friend messages you on whatsapp and says text hey text let s go eat text where should we go the gear sport will vibrate times for each notification but when you look at the watch you will only see the latest text which is where should we go the only app that supports text history is the messages app which defaults to the sms app on your phone and cannot be changed this is also the case with emails where you will only be able to see the latest email you received same with google hangouts instagram facebook etc the watch does not keep a history of the notifications received per app even if you didn t look at them that s such a huge oversight in my opinion even my pebble time had this feature original review in short this is a really great smartwatch and fitness tracker for those who thought the samsung gear s was too bulky and find all the other options in the market asus motorola garmin fitbit and huawei lacking my needs receive notifications track steps track jogging and cycling workouts sync calendar send texts control music good battery life and be comfortable warning long review ahead notificationsthe samsung gear sport can receive any push notification your phone receives you can choose which ones you want to turn off and only focus on certain ones just because you receive the notification for a certain app on your phone doesn t mean you need the same app on the watch note the watch only shows you the most recent notifications per app step trackingtracking of steps seems to be fairly accurate it will be accurate if i m walking with my arms to the side or if my hands are in my pocket it is not accurate if i m pushing a stroller or shopping cartin theory this should be able to count the number of floors for every ft in elevation it senses but i haven t had a chance to test yet from the gear s reviews it doesn t seem like it s going to be the most accurate feature here track jogging and cyclingusing the built in gps tracking my runs and bike rides is pretty accurate i like how i can leave my phone at home start a workout and the gps kicks in and starts tracking me given that i m a very data centric person i really appreciate being able to go back on my phone and see all the data points from my workout including a map of what i ve done obviously initiating the workout will drain the battery quicker but if i keep it under two hours then the gear sport will still last me an entire day music without my phone i connect my jaybird bluetooth earphones to the watch and play from my spotify offline playlist unfortunately this doesn t track how many times i pick up my baby who gets heavier by the day but that s kind of wishful thinking heart ratethe heart rate can be triggered on demand so you can check your pulse whenever you feel like it during a workout it is triggered automatically throughout the workout so you know where you stand i can t speak to how accurate it is but rather than focusing on the accuracy of the number itself i like to use it in relation to where it was when i started middle and end for example if the watch says my initial bpm is and in the middle of the workout it s then my workout is being effective i don t care if it s actually instead of but rather my bpm has doubled since my workout started by default it is configured to take your heart rate every minutes when you re idle i turned this off since i don t really care for it sync calendarliving the corporate life i m constantly bombarded with meetings followed by additional meetings to some degree these meetings are the vain of my working existence but a necessary evil at times so i need a way at any given moment to very quickly check the meetings coming up in the next few hours since i m this watch with my samsung s and by extension the samsung calendar app that connects to my google calendar then i can look at all my meetings immediately on the watch i ll also get the reminder alerts minutes before my meeting starts which is a life saver send texts sms google hangouts whatsapp kakaotalk here s the deal if i m getting a text from a friend and i want to respond really quickly with ok thanks or a more lengthy response i don t want to take out my phone every single time it s much easier to configure a canned response that i can choose from or speak to the watch to respond have it transcribed and once approved send the text this makes it really convenient in so many levels by the way this works with all of my messaging apps note there is no speaker on this watch so you will not be able to get audible notifications and make phone calls control musici m a spotify premium customer have been for quite some time so when i heard that this watch was going to let me sync my playlists up to gb for offline play that got me excited but honestly most of the time i use the spotify app on the watch to control the music that is playing on my phone which is being sent to alexa that is connected to my studio monitors even if i m not listening to music on spotify and got a podcast instead no problem the regular music app works just fine with that when i m working out without my phone i connect my jaybird bluetooth earbuds to the watch and continue listening in offline mode note there is no speaker on this watch battery and comfortthere s no sense in having all the features in the world if the watch doesn t last me a day and it s not comfortable to wear this is why i ve kept my pebble time for years and no other smartwatch in the market could replace it i m glad samsung has figured out that customers want to have our cake and eat it too meaning we want all the functionality in a form factor that s very light thin with a battery that lasts days battery wise i can go days on a single charge with medium use i check notifications when they arrive about hr during the working hours check for meetings hr control music from time to time and have one maybe two hour workout i do leave the watch face off until i bring it up to look at it so it s not always on and saves some battery comfort wise it s light slim and the watch face is just the right diameter i m lb and my wrists aren t particarly small or large my medium sized hands whatever that means can wrap around my wrist so that my middle finger and thumb are touching if that gives you an idea at all of how big my wrists are i can tell you that this watch is really comfortable and most of the time you don t notice it i ll post pictures compared to my pebble time but they re equally comfortable even though the pebble is significantly smaller so this can do a lot more than what i ve written about such as auto tracking workouts swimming have tons of other apps installed change watchfaces etc i don t really use those that often so i can t comment on it but i m glad it s there build qualityyou re paying for a watch it better be well built especially if it s going to be waterproof up to m and used for workouts and swimming good news it is designthat rotating bezel pure genius i m glad they kept it for this design as it works really well half the time i m playing with the watch i m just rotating the bezel just for fun the two buttons on the right side have a nice click to it it looks nice and functions admirably performancewhile this has the same processor as the samsung gear s from october this version has more ram and the os has been optimized a bit more i do notice some lag from time to time but only when the watch is doing something a bit more processor intensive such as clearing out my notifications but of the time it s very speedy and responsive ok that s a long enough review there s plenty of value for me to highly recommend this to anyone looking for a smartwatch if all you want is track workouts perhaps consider a fitbit or something similar if you want an inspector gadget mini computer from the future on your wrist this is it', 'this is a great smart watch i am impressed thoughts from a long time apple watch owner i m been wearing an apple watch since they first launched in the summer of and have been a big fan since then i ve seen the evolution of smart watches from motorola samsung and other companies evolve into nicer and better products and this samsung gear really caught my attention when i saw it the best part for me is it works with ios so i could connect it to my iphone and compare it against my apple watch which is the new series ceramic with lte i was shocked to discover both a lot of similarities as well as a lot of differences between the watches while the samsung took a little longer to connect to my iphone than the apple watch it wasn t difficult and the watch helps guide you in the process i am going to try not to make this an apple watch vs samsung gear sport review because that isn t the point of this review i just wanted to point out that i have experience with both watches so i kind of knew what features to look for that are things i actually use for example the barometer app is a fun novelty but it s not something i will be using daily like the calorie counter feature first build quality it is excellent on the gear sport the metal casing is a shiny gunmetal color and feels very solid the outer ring feels satisfying to turn with small clicks as you rotate it this is one of my favorite features of this watch the overall look of this watch is very nice and classy and aside from the relatively cheap looking rubber strap it looks like a nice analog watch and not this weird rectangle thing the side buttons have rubber on them and are easy to press i give the build quality of this watch stars it feels good to wear and doesn t seem big or heavy at all i wore watches for almost a week to test this watch and hardly noticed it unless i got a vibrating notification the screen on this watch is also beautiful and has vibrant colors i was immediately captivated by the round screen and how nice all the watch faces look of course if you look very closely you can see pixels but when you look down at your watch it looks crisp and bright and colorful i also give the screen stars so far this watch has really impressed me it comes with a cool plastic stand that charges it sideways and is similar to apple s nightstand mode except it retains your same watch face instead of the plain green look the only gripe i have with the charging stand is i keep it by my bed and the red or green charging light is always on and was distracting to me when i was sleeping a piece of tape solves that problem if it bothers you but i did think that was an interesting design decision since it s so easy to see that the watch is charged by looking at the screen the touchscreen itself works fine and the watch uses haptic feedback well to let you know that a tap of the screen was successful i found myself swiping around a lot until i realized the outer ring could cycle through various apps quickly and easily one issue i had with the touchscreen is that i wasn t able to wake it up just by tapping it so i tap a side button or turn the ring instead this is annoying when you raise your wrist and the sensor doesn t turn the screen on which did happen to me quite a lot i think i m just used to the way my other watch works and this one requires just a little more wrist movement to trigger the screen in samsung s defense you can set the screen to always be on but that does wear the battery down considerably faster overall it wasn t a big issue for me just something i noticed the included software is pretty good the step tracking activity tracker and heart rate monitor all function similar to the apple watch and work pretty well once you enter your weight height and age if you don t do that the numbers will be way wrong the heartrate monitor was consistently within bpm of my other watch but i did notice the sensor is more sensitive and i had to have it positioned just right or it wasn t able to take a measurement again the apple watch is not that picky with series and seems to work if the watch is tight or loose and in different positions on the wrist i did have more issues with my series watch so i m sure this is something samsung can improve on with future iterations one thing i didn t love but is a great feature idea was the automatic activity tracking maybe this is an edge case but i found it would automatically start a workout whenever i would be in a hurry to do something it sees my heart rate is up and detects movement and starts an auto workout it was kind of funny and it sort of served as a reminder to chill out and not be in such a rush to do stuff but i did end up turning that off it s so easy to start a workout manually just twist the outer ring and choose your activity and start it very simple and it works great other features i use often are alerts for email and texts those worked great although there is no easy way to reply on the gear sport i m sure there is a way but it wasn t obvious to me on my other watch i can reply with voice to text or a list of pre written responses as well as a scribble mode to type short messages this is a minor thing since i usually pull out my phone when i get a text and i never reply to email via my watch but i thought it was worth mentioning a thing i love about this watch was the option to download new watch faces from the samsung app or directly on the phone you can also download games and utility apps there is even an app to watch youtube videos which seems really cool but i couldn t get it to work even after trying several times the videos just wouldn t load for me but that s fine novelty apps are fun and it s cool to play a game of snake or tetris on your watch but after you ve had it for a while it s nice to just have a nice looking watch that works well has a nice looking screen records your workout activity and gives you alerts this watch is water resistant and i had no trouble with it being in a few feet of water for a while the samsung gear app was easy to install and connect to my iphone it s a bit weird going from the way apple does things to the samsung way so android users will no doubt have an easier and better experience than i did but i still had a very nice experience overall with this watch i find myself wearing it more than i thought i would because the screen is so nice to look at but at the end of the day it s a very tough decision if i had to pick one watch for android users it s a no brainer get this watch if you want a sporty but nice looking smart watch with a lot of features i like that this watch doesn t go nuts with the features you don t need like a camera the samsung gear sport is just a clean looking watch that works great with android os or ios and with so many choices of watch face and optional watch bands you can give it a personality to match whatever mood you are in overall i give this watch stars maybe it s not perfect but it s much much nicer than i expected and has given me a lot of respect for samsung s design choices and manufacturing ability the fit and finish of this watch is excellent and very comparable to apple i forgot to mention that battery life is pretty good and with the settings i had the watch could last just about days with normal use although i prefer to charge it nightly out of habit since it s so easy with the inductive charger they include battery life was very similar to the series mm apple watch maybe a touch more in either case both watches were around at the end of the day with my use i want to note that the gear sport gives a lot of options for how long the screen stays on vibration intensity wifi or bluetooth mode etc that can really affect battery life i ve included some photos of the watches next to each other for comparison these were just shot with my phone and i m not a professional photographer so i apologize for the quality but it might be useful to someone to compare them side by side i m sure there are tech websites that do a better job at this but i wanted to at least post some photos i m sorry if some are sideways it has to do with the way amazon formats the photos i am a huge fan of smart watches in general and just like some people own several different analog watches i don t think there is anything wrong with owning different smart watches if you are really concerned with fitness tracking over time you may want to stick with one smart watch but for casual working out both watches do a good job of counting calories and keeping track of your workout activity if multiple watches is something you are considering i know most people are going to get one or the other and both watches are a great choice in my opinion']

Name: 1_the_and_to_they
Representative_Docs: ['decent first effort by samsung note my review previously incorrectly stated that iconx earbuds do not work with ios they do pair with an iphone and other ios devices and play sound without any issues touch playback controls work however there s no support for fitness features i apologize for misreading the spec sheet without actually trying them out with an ios device i am an avid runner and a martial artist and have always been on the lookout for truly wireless earbuds that would allow me to fully engage in my workouts without worrying about them falling out or getting displaced thanks to samsung i have finally found them but it s not to say they re perfect or without compromises i should also mention that my previous go to earbuds were jaybird x and i will compare the two below in some areas on to the main points build quality design solid hard plastic they look like they are built to last solid case that doubles as a charging dock and has a battery of its own that is good enough to recharge the earbuds about times a clever move by samsung given the battery life is one of the iconx s major weaknesses fit the earbuds fit exceptionally well i have medium sized ears and ended up using m size tips and l size wings there are pairs of each included they never fell out or came loose during running heavy bag workout or anything else i threw at them easy to put in and take out of your ears as well exceptionally light colour me very impressed samsung look while visible in your ears they re not sticking out too much i like the look of them far more than my jaybird x compatibility only android is officially supported per spec sheet though they do pair with ios and play sound as your regular bluetooth headphones i had no issues whatsoever connecting my samsung galaxy s to it and listening to music podcasts via bluetooth samsung gear app found it instantly and connected without any probs also successfully tested with an iphone for music podcast playback controls i have mixed feelings about touch controls in casual use they re simple and quite reliable once you get used to them but can be finicky during workouts when you re moving and your hands are sweaty all in all they work pretty well i like the fact that either earbud responds to touch commands the automatic pairing start once you put them in and the auto stop once you take them out are nice touches as well activity tracking this is where we get into some negatives iconx fails miserably as an activity tracker it cannot track distance accurately due to lack of gps it told me i ve run km after completing a km run which is just cruel the heart rate monitor as is the case with many other trackers is unreliable i really wish they d concentrated their efforts on sound quality and audio player features instead speaking of which sound no issues with sync between the earpieces or sound cutting out as reported with some other similar wireless headsets sound quality is pretty good for a bluetooth headset it can be described as warm with bass present but not overpowering highs and mids are somewhat lacking but not to the point where you won t enjoy your music jaybird x in comparison does sound a little better but not by a huge margin noise isolation superb they cancel out all the noise around you which can be a good or a bad thing depending on what you re doing there is an ambient sound mode that allows you to hear the surroundings but it is a bit weird as the sound is fed through the built in mics music player iconx have gb of internal storage to store your audio files each earbud has gb capacity and audio files are copied to both during transfers in case you re wondering unfortunately the built in music player is very limited you can jump back and forth between tracks randomize their play pause play and that s about it no skipping no playlist support which makes them terrible for podcasts or any similar large audio tracks you do have an option of streaming podcasts directly from your phone but that diminishes the already limited battery life its single biggest weakness battery obviously you can t have something this light without compromising battery size i generally found the battery life claims by samsung accurate hrs depending on enabled features my average workout length is hrs and i use them as a standalone mp player with bluetooth activity tracking off which works quite well streaming bluetooth will drain the battery very quick you ll be lucky to get hrs out of them another major issue that i ve found with the related to battery life is that they drain battery when left unused in case or otherwise for a day or two there are many reports of this on various boards including samsung support forums i ve contacted samsung support about this issue and they say this is not normal behavior and the earbuds should not be discharging while in the case still not decided whether to take them in for repairs or exchange at costco where i bought them but i will update the review with regards to this problem overall a decent first effort by samsung given the fact this is a first truly wireless headset from a major manufacturer i am willing to accept some compromises i took off stars for the rather useless activity tracking features the limited playback capabilities and the battery life issues i am sure the next iterations will bring the much needed improvements and i am curious to see what other manufacturers come up with', 'magnificent with a few frustrations these sony wireless ear buds are my favorite tech item i absolutely love so much about them from the sound quality to the compactness to the battery life but they are flawed enough that i do not think they deserve five stars out of if it was possible how can this be read on programming note i tested these headphones with a useful spotify playlist called songs to test headphones with i also listened to my regular music for months and months with these headphones because i enjoy them so much and because it was so hard for me to write this review sound quality everything begins with the sound quality the sony wh xm over ear headphones have this magical immersive sound that makes you rediscover music and luxuriate in sound like nothing i ve experienced before despite having listened to some very good mid range headphones before the problem with the wh xm headphones is the size they are large over the ear headphones that is what makes the wf xm earbuds so incredible sony engineers have somehow managed to get of the sound quality of the wh xm headphones into small ear buds if sound quality is important to you and you need earbuds you can stuff in a pocket these earbuds are absolutely exceptional if you travel everywhere with a bag and this is not an issue consider the wh xm over ear phones there is absolutely no comparison to lesser earbuds like the samsung gear icon x the icon x sound like scratchy am radio after listening to music on the sony earbuds bluetooth phone calls the quality of bluetooth calls leaves a lot to be desired in a quiet place sure its fine but in any kind of noisy place it is almost impossible to have a call the aforementioned gear icon x do a better job sony seems to struggle with bluetooth generally bluetooth connection the earbuds independently connect to bluetooth which is great but i suspect they have some issues in terms of bandwidth transmission because they seem to work flawlessly in my home but out and about they frequently drop perhaps a more technically minded person has more insights battery life absolutely stunning not only have i never run out of charge on the battery case despite being tremendously lazy about charging it but i ve never run out of charge on the buds this would doubtless change if i wore them on an international flight but for ordinary daily use you ll be hard pressed to have battery issues fit and comfort i don t love the fit of these buds they are a little bigger than the typical earbud and always feel a little awkward when you are walking around it s important to find a positive fit for both noise cancelling and sound quality so this may take you a little work they also are not great earbuds to work out in as they don t tolerate sweat well that said they are without a doubt the most comfortable earbuds for long duration listening i ve ever used i even fall asleep wearing these earbuds and wake up hours later with no discomfort really exceptional noise cancelling actually really fantastic but sony has insisted on making the default settings less than full noise cancelling maybe because they are worried about people walking around and getting run down by cars they don t hear to take life into your own hands you have to go into the sony app and set everything to max once you do the outside world is very effectively blocked out yes you can still hear murmurs but it knocks everything down twenty decibels this is amazing for plane rides and other persistently noisy environments the only problem is that people cannot see the earbuds in your ears and sometimes will end up yelling at you frustrated that you cannot hear them about that app it s a little finicky but absolutely essential to gain control over your earbuds if i wasn t able to turn off the touch controls on the side of the earbuds they would be a star product for me but because i am able to go into the app and control this the earbuds are much more useful ditto some other quirks if you pull one ear bud out while on a call the other ear bud persists if you pull one ear bud out while listening to music it pauses you can change this in the app as well i am not sure which way i prefer but its nice to have the option you can also let the app analyze your ear shape for a supposedly better quality sound i haven t gotten around to doing this if you drop one of your earbuds sony has your back by providing a blinking light this light is only active if the earbud doesn t sense any pressure around it ie its not in your fingers or your ear this is pretty clever missed opportunities i do not know why manufacturers insist on putting controls on ear buds i never use them in a positive fashion and i just end up mistakenly doing things while adjusting my earbuds instead why not make the battery case a remote control i would also love to see a special edition of the case decked out like a sony walkman wouldn t that be cool overall i think these earbuds are fantastic you get truly exceptional sound quality a balanced and immersive experience that sounds great for everything from classical music to hip hop and rock in between truly hearing all the details of your music in a package that fits into a jeans pocket that s pretty amazing add to that very good noise cancelling and excellent battery life true the bluetooth calling leaves a lot to be desired and occasional bluetooth drops may frustrate you but pound for pound these earbuds are the champs recommended', 'not ok definitely not worth the price updated review now that i ve lived with these earbuds for almost months i realize that my original review was too hasty and far too generous these samsung gear iconx earbuds are so frustrating at least every other day they are unusable due to a poor connection they keep cutting out until i finally give up and just finish my workouts without them the other half of the time they work just fine but that s not nearly reliable enough i ve never had such connectivity problems with my bose or even with my ultra cheap mpow headphones also frequently one side or the other stops working during my workouts sometimes a side will stop playing any sound but will keep responding to touch inputs other times one side will stop responding to touch inputs but will keep playing sound additionally as i ve noticed many other people complaining about online the r side gradually faded out over the course of two workouts to the point that i could no longer hear any sound coming from it my searches online indicated that i needed to clean the little screen with alcohol which i did the r earbud started working fine again for a few hours but then faded out again shortly thereafter the l earbud faded down to nothing i cleaned that one with alcohol and it worked fine again for a few hours before fading out again that s totally unacceptable i find these samsung gear iconx earbuds to be borderline unusable samsung clearly doesn t know what it s doing and should not have released these earbuds with such monumental problems the only problem i have left is figuring out how if i can return them original review the samsung gear iconx totally wireless headphones are ok overall though very unfriendly to iphones they were a bit of a pain to connect to my iphone they don t have an iphone app to manage the headphones and you can t use certain features if you re using an iphone like their variable ambient noise feature or the ability to download music into the earbuds themselves virtually everybody else in the market makes their headphones just as easy to use on an iphone as on an android phone i don t know why samsung decided to make these iconx headphones less attractive for iphone users it s not like anybody is actually going to switch from the iphone to a galaxy phone just to be able to use more features with the iconx s while i can only assume that it s easy to set up these headphones on an android phone the process was a bit of a struggle with the iphone unlike the other pairs of wireless headphones that i ve had which all linked to the iphone quickly and seamlessly it took several tries connecting disconnecting forgetting connecting disconnecting forgetting connecting the iconx s bluetooth to my iphone i also had to keep taking the iconx s in and out of their case during the process to try to get them to connect and had to charge the case first before i was able to connect them one odd quirk about the iconx s is that now that they re connected they never disconnect from my iphone whenever i put the earbuds back in their case they remain connected at least the battery indicator on my iphone keeps monitoring their charge level they ll stay connected to my iphone in this manner for days even though i m not using them one possible consequence of this quirk is that they seem to lose their charge faster for instance i put them in their little case on sunday afternoon and my iphone said that the iconx s had of their charge left i didn t use them again until wednesday morning hours later and at that time they only lasted for minutes before dying they should have gone a lot longer if they indeed had of their charge left when i put them away on sunday all of my other wireless headphones disconnected from my iphone s bluetooth when i put them back in their case or plugged them in to charge i don t know what samsung was thinking the sound quality of the iconx s is fairly average frankly i expected more from headphones that cost they pale in comparison to the sound quality of the bose soundsport free earbuds though the bose have their own glaring problem unfortunately see below while the iconx s certainly aren t good enough that i would listen to music on them at home i do feel like they are adequate for the gym which is the only place i use earbuds what i do like about the iconx s is how they fit a lot of earphones don t fit my earholes very well for some reason e g rha s earbuds but these iconx s seat in my ears quite nicely as a result of their proper fit they block out a good bit of ambient noise which help them maintain a decent sound quality when you re in a noisy environment like the gym this was the fatal flaw of the bose soundsport free earbuds they let in so much ambient noise that they sounded just awful in the gym the bose s excellent sound quality in a quiet environment was completely lost as they were overwhelmed by ambient noise turning back to the iconx s one other feature that i like in terms of their fit is the little wings that tuck into the external part of your ears the wings are fairly comfortable and keep the iconx s in very securely like the bose but very unlike the rhas which kept falling out of my ears onto the ground no matter which of their many eartips i tried the iconx s connectivity is also decent most of the time not stellar but again usually good enough for the gym you ll rarely hear the sound ping pong back and forth between the l and r earbuds as is a problem with some other brands i m looking at you rha though it does happen more on some days than on others they ve actually been terrible the past days for me my mpow earbuds have a greater range than the iconx s before they start cutting out but again i think that the range of the iconx s is good enough for most purposes i do however find that the iconx s suffer more from interference than the bose for example sometimes the iconx s don t like it when somebody walks between me and my iphone which is only ft away from me or when my head is facing the wrong way that s annoying but it doesn t happen too often one of my other gripes about the iconx s is their touchpads ugh they are very finicky and rarely do what i m trying to tell them to do they are especially problematic when i m trying to increase or decrease the volume with a swipe up or down most of the time when i m trying to change the volume they pause then they play then they pause then they jump to the next song it is very annoying i usually get frustrated and just dig my iphone out of my backpack to change the volume i have similar problems when trying to get the iconx s to pause play skip songs go back a song they usually do something else instead until they perfect these touchpads i wish samsung would go back to physical buttons my other gripe about the touchpads is how i often accidentally touch them with my bicep or even a gym towel when wiping sweat off of my face and it pauses the audio this happens most often during certain tricep and abdominal exercises and when i m doing cardio one more gripe before i go the two lights on their case are entirely uninformative the only time i ve ever seen them light up green are when the case is plugged into a power source and is fully charged when it s not plugged in even though they re almost fully charged both lights light up red when they are down to half of their charge both light up red when they are almost on empty both light up red why on earth would samsung not have them go from green to yellow to red better yet why not do what so many other manufacturers have done so effectively and have a series of lights that show you how much charge is left i don t get it the moral of my very long winded story is that the samsung gear iconx earbuds are ok the sound quality is ok their connectivity is ok and their fit is pretty good i wouldn t advise getting them unless they re on sale and i d make sure to buy them from a vendor that will allow you to return them easily in case you don t like them also i think they re better for android users than they are for iphone users i m still on the fence about whether to keep them']

Name: 2_camera_the_to_and
Representative_Docs: ['usually v is better but not with the samsung gear edition i was an early adopter and had the first samsung v international version straight from korea and then upgraded to v the samsung gear edition the camera is now almost unusable and i regret selling my first version i won t go through all the problems honestly i m so upset and so angry at samsung for screwing this up that i m not going to waste my time telling them how to better engineer forward rather than backwards they really took everything about the success of the first camera and absolutely ruined it in this second version it s stunning how they blew it they made the new camera an awkward shape took away the tripod and gave you an odd rubber ring to balance the camera on took away the ability to swap batteries and made the editing software unusable they also just gave the camera quirks for example prior to writing this review i tried to get a video off the camera three times it kept failing for various reasons first a phone call interrupted the app the app literally shut down because my cell got a phone call that i didn t answer second i restarted the app and trying to stick a video and a notification came in voice mail or text message again i didn t touch the phone but the fact that an incoming message of any kind will shut down the app entirely means that you cannot save videos while anything is going on which might disturb your phone lastly my phone ran out of storage trying to stitch a minute video never mind that i have a gig card and nothing on it but a few videos from the samsung all under minutes each processing stitching takes a huge amount of space and so you have do one video at a time delete them then move on to the next it s a tedious and overwhelming process for transferring videos for people looking at this camera i will say three things get the original camera the resolution is slightly less and it s slightly bigger but it s a better camera overall e g replaceable battery not as top heavy easier interface useful but removable tripod etc assume that you ll only be able to take photos with these cameras not video budget friendly video from cameras like this sent to a smartphone is simply not yet ready for prime time the files are too large they aren t editable see below the processing power to stitch longer videos is too great and the options for viewing later are too limited e g i can t send them to my wife to watch on her iphone unless i upload them youtube so she can watch them there assume that you will not able to edit your videos at all this may not seem like a big deal at first but keep in mind that video means you can t hide behind the camera this means that when your record video you get everything including walking to the camera and back to start it or staring at your phone to start and stop it and you can t edit out any awkward or boring parts this makes the camera a one trick pony you can get short video clips so long as the timing of events and everything is perfect it s not practical to record longer videos and then select highlights because you can t edit trim or splice the video you re supposed to be able to edit using downloadable cyberlink video software but it s totally usable on windows and mac some people have somehow been able to get it to work but it s been my luck or chance certainly not by design the software is terrible and cyberlink has been making crap software for years they are the company take makes awkward and bloated software packaged with some camcorders no one ever buys their software because it s horrible it s sort of software you get stuck with because you have no choice i don t mean to be harsh but it s the truth their software is used in more of a hostage situation than by choice well that s the case here don t buy this camera don t even think about it get yourself a first version samsung or consider a gopro hero session', 'samsung gear quality that you expect for samsung but not with out its flaws asin b d lvl g samsung gear real high resolution vr camera us version with warranty my experience with the gear camera has been a love hate so far i love the videos the easy time lapse set up google maps and phone to camera integration ease of use it s a well made well constructed camera the small but effective tripod that comes with the camera is not of cheap plastic design and the fact is a samsung to me make it well worth the few down falls i have found so far please remember this is my opinion of the samsung gear the camera comes is a well put together package with the following items included samsung gear camera nicely made tripod witch can double as a selfie stick of some sorts micro cloth for cleaning the lenses wrist strap carrying bag usb cable for charging and file transfer s no wall charger included x samsung li ion mah battery samsung micro sd card gbi shoot mostly videos with the gear camera it s a fun device you can take most anywhere in your daily travels the camera mounts on a tripod mount screw type mount and if you like me you own different type of action cameras gp and really don t want to purchase a bunch of different mounts this is easy to use your existing mounts just purchase the adapter and you re good to go the camera only works at this time with the following type of phones galaxy s s edge s edge note s s edge and note i ve head of apps that will let you use the gear on other phones but i wouldn t know this the phone is nfc enabled dust and water resistance is bluetooth enabled wi fi capable micro sd up to gb you can use you samsung vr head set to get a really cool vr experience with your videos and pictures stitching the your videos and pictures is easy as you just down load by wi fi from the camera to you phone then select the files one at a time and let the phone do its magic but this process will take some time or i have found the fastest way of doing this is to hook the camera up to a computer then hook you phone up to the computer and transfer the files into you gear folder on your phone this way you can stitch you videos and pictures while on the go all in all the samsung gear is a fun camera for the whole family ok now for what i call the down fall parts of a review but it s not without its flaws some fixable some not what i can t stand about the whole thing is the apparent stitching of the videos the lack of heat control witch is apparent when your camera is in the sun or just heats up by the videos blurriness or lack of sharpness you can see the difference in the videos and pictures as time goes on and the sharpness starts to fade a little i have a couple of k action camera and the clarity is undeniable i ve read that this could be fixed with a firmware update to counter the problem the camera its self is bulky you just can t throw it into your pocket well you could but you might get some looks the lack of mac software for the gear action director is a really bad decision by samsung hopefully samsung with remedies this problem i have used the parallels desk top for my mac book with windows but this rout does not work very well at all if you shoot a lot of video like i do you will need to purchase another battery you buy one here on amazon for at the time of this review i would highly recommend this thank you', 'the virtual reality camera that has it all almost the new gear is a still camera video camera and a virtual reality camera all in one it takes perceptive imagery that allow you to look around and feel like you are actually there in person the footage can be used in a vr headset shared on facebook or viewed on a mobile device the camera has both photo and video with audio capabilities all wrapped in a size smaller than your hand included in the package are the camera a small tripod a carrying case usb cable instructions microfiber cloth and a wrist strap there is also a licence key for the desktop software included so be sure to find this right away and keep it secure the good it comes with software that can stitch the images into one sphere on a desktop computer or the app can even stitch the photos jpg and videos on the go and you can share right from your mobile device the resolution is good with settings for k k and you can also choose to use both lenses or just one to take wide angle fish eye pictures it is google street view compatible allowing you to quickly upload images to google maps on the go you are easily able to switch from photo to video to time lapse and cover many types of shots in any situation controlling the camera can be done either with buttons located on the camera or with the samsung gear app that can be downloaded free from the samsung app store some settings like the iso sharpness camera orientation and time interval can only be controlled with the mobile app while the most common camera settings can be changed right from the buttons on the camera it comes with a small tripod that was designed for the gear and it works well on a table but for many people purchasing a mono pod with a stand will bring the camera to the height that will produce the best footage just be sure to add some weights to the base of your mono pod so the camera will not fall over in the grass or blow over in the wind i am not afraid to take it out in the snow or rain as the camera is splash proof i have actually inadvertently tested this while shooting a waterfall and the camera held up perfectly the desktop software included must be downloaded and there is a licence code in the package that will activate the software dont loose this small sticker when you open the package the software is simple to use and can not only stitch the images and video but you can fully produce edited videos from start to end including transitions and a library of free intro text and animations included the software allows for color correction stabilization and many controls that can enhance your photos and videos stitching can take some time for larger videos even on a high end computer but i have taken k video over minutes long and stitched it in a short time the movies are in mp h format and the camera can utilize micro sd cards up to gb the mobile app is a multi function camera remote control a image and video processor remote viewer and a way to easily share to social media and youtube because others have had connection issues with the app it will be important that you use the samsung galaxy store not the google play store to download the gear manager that will run your camera once installed you start your mobile devices bluetooth and connect to the camera the camera should recognize the device and the samsung software will start automatically the bluetooth connection will reduce battery life mah in the camera so if you need a longer lasting battery use the on camera controls i purchased additional spare batteries for travel and important video events you have the option to save the footage to your mobile device edit them to some degree and to share them over several platforms once connected the mobile app is a cool tech tool in itself and people that i showed were amazed at the cameras abilities other info mp sensoriso range maxgyro accelerometerthe bad the one thing missing is live streaming but with the app sharing quickly via mobile is just a few clicks away with the two lenses sticking out a bit you need to transport the camera carefully so they are not scratched and like other cameras dont drop it because it could easily break the lens cover stitching photos is very consistent but with video you need to be aware of any areas or distance that there might be stitching artifacts i keep that area of the camera pointed in a direction not as important the audio is about what you would expect from a mobile phone so if you are planning a higher end video you will want external audio recording for remote control app you do need to have a samsung compatible device s s note my final thoughts smaller than the palm of your hand easy to use battery that lasts for hours features that go beyond the sharpness better than any consumer available and images that are jaw dropping the samsung can transform anyone into a virtual reality photographer with features that you would expect at double this price i have only spent weeks with the camera and have already purchased an additional camera and battery to get more videos images attached gear manager screenshot camera and case camera on monopod']

Name: 3_vr_the_gear_it
Representative_Docs: ['a must have for gear vr owners as it makes using the headset a lot easier if you own a samsung gear vr i highly recommend that you buy this controller it works with a lot of the games on gear vr but for me i bought it because it makes navigating the menus a lot easier than with the controls on the side of the gear vr it s easy to setup and very intuitive definitely a must buy', 'decent new input device but still a lot to be desired there s still some work to be done for samsung gear vr i bought this to enhance my already light samsung gear vr experience as a pc and general gamer vr has been very intriguing to me ever since it s inception but i don t feel the market is large enough to justify spending on the oculus rift or htc vive at the moment that said i do have a samsung s edge so the small additional cost of the headset and some controllers isn t too bad the samsung gear vr controller adds an enjoyable new way to interact with the gear vr environment but there s still a lot of limitations since it s limited to tilt and direction control you don t get feedback from moving your arm forward backwards or higher lower still it adds a lot of immersion to things like shooters drop dead is quite fun with this you may find yourself resetting the position often lastly the way that on off is handled is terrible in my opinion it will sleep after a while but you can t manually turn it off save taking out the batteries which is needless to say not very convenient i ve run into many issues with connectivity because of this i think often the controller will not turn off or it won t pair i have to cycle through my bluetooth on off taking out the batteries etc and even after it connects it will drop off in the software i have not been able to find the solution it just doesn t work until it does after multiple attempts i am awaiting more firmware and software available to see if the experience can get better all in all i purchased this discounted so i don t regret the purchase too much', 'great for use with samsung gear vr i don t normally play computer games so i purchased this solely for use with the samsung gear vr headset unlike another non samsung controller i had tried this works with all the gear vr software seems a bit expensive for what it is and a bit smaller and more cheaply made than i expected but it s worth it to me to not have to worry about it being compatible with gear vr software']
